scripts.build: sh -lc 'if command -v go >/dev/null 2>&1; then go build ./cmd/api && go build ./cmd/worker; else docker run --rm -v "$PWD":/src -w /src golang:1.24 sh -lc "/usr/local/go/bin/go build ./cmd/api && /usr/local/go/bin/go build ./cmd/worker"; fi'
scripts.lint: sh -lc 'if command -v go >/dev/null 2>&1; then go vet ./...; else docker run --rm -v "$PWD":/src -w /src golang:1.24 sh -lc "/usr/local/go/bin/go vet ./..."; fi'
scripts.check-types: sh -lc 'if command -v go >/dev/null 2>&1; then go test ./...; else docker run --rm -v "$PWD":/src -w /src golang:1.24 sh -lc "/usr/local/go/bin/go test ./..."; fi'
scripts.test: sh -lc 'if command -v go >/dev/null 2>&1; then go test ./...; else docker run --rm -v "$PWD":/src -w /src golang:1.24 sh -lc "/usr/local/go/bin/go test ./..."; fi'
